model_comparison: Both models achieved perfect scores on content accuracy and fluency, producing natural-sounding speech without errors. The decisive difference lies in the 'Age' dimension. Model 1 accurately followed the instruction to use a 'child's voice,' modulating pitch, timbre, and intonation to convincingly simulate a young character.
